summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LGSS SCUM Server Manager Iteration 8 - Log Parsing, Event Feed & Discord Webhooks. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified: LogsView with event feed, type filters, player search, top players ribbon; DiscordSettings with 8 webhook inputs and persistence. Regression tests confirmed all previous features still working.
critical_code_review_comments: UTF-16 LE with BOM log parsing implemented correctly in scum_logs.py - handles SCUM's native encoding
Event deduplication working via SHA1 hash of server_id + source_file + ts + body
Economy log parser correctly filters out 'Before/After' balance lines, only emitting actual trade events
Discord webhook forwarding implemented with per-event-type URLs and embed formatting
MongoDB server_events collection properly indexed for efficient queries
LogsView auto-refreshes every 10 seconds for live event monitoring
seed_data_creation: Tests use POST /api/setup/reset to clear state. PUT /api/setup with {is_admin_confirmed:true, selected_disk:'/', manager_path:'/tmp/LGSSManagers', completed:true} to setup. Sample logs at /app/backend/sample_logs/
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 adds: (1) SCUM log parsing with UTF-16 LE support (admin, chat, login, kill, economy, violation, fame, raid types), (2) Event ingestion via file upload (POST /servers/{id}/logs/import) and folder scan (POST /servers/{id}/logs/scan), (3) MongoDB-backed event storage with dedup by SHA1 hash, (4) Live event feed UI (LogsView) with type filters, player search, top players ribbon, (5) Per-server Discord webhook integration with per-event-type URLs and test-send. Key data-testids: logs-view, logs-upload-input, logs-upload-hero-btn, logs-filter-{type}, logs-player-filter, logs-refresh-btn, logs-clear-btn, top-player-{n}, discord-settings, discord-{type}-input, discord-mention-role-input, discord-save-btn, discord-{type}-test.

log_import.accepts: multipart/form-data with UTF-16 LE encoded .log file

events_list.returns: {server_id, count, events: [{id, ts, type, server_id, source_file, ...type-specific fields}]}

deduplication.method: SHA1 hash of server_id + source_file + ts + body

logs_view.filter_chips: [data-testid='logs-filter-{type}'] for admin, chat, login, kill, economy, violation, fame, raid

discord_settings.location: Configuration → Automation tab → Discord Integration panel

event_row_rendering.economy: player purchased/sold item for amount @ trader

mocked_apis.note: NO MOCKED APIs. All features are REAL: log parsing, event storage, Discord webhook forwarding (with real HTTP calls).
